description.ko: 암석과 토양을 통해 세계의 역사를 드러내는 지구 표면에 대한 정밀한 지형학적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A highly detailed topographic study of Earth's surface, revealing the history of the world through rock and soil.

prompt: A cinematic top-down satellite view of TERRA-1, showcasing a hyper-realistic geological transition. The scene moves from cracked #8B4513 burnt sienna desert clay into jagged #2F4F4F volcanic basalt ridges with glowing #D2691E magma veins visible through the fissures. Intricate sediment layers and #F4A460 sandy topographic patterns create a narrative of time carved into the land. Macro-geological details, 8k resolution, natural lighting, capturing the raw, textured power of the Earth's crust.
